CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Continued To Oct-04-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Robert Shatzko, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. Counsel appears after proceedings have ended and barges his way in to court asking to be heard. Judge allows counsel to address the court. The CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause is re-set to Oct-04-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. ***NOTE: Request for reconsideration of the May-24-2016 order denying the request to vacate sanctions for failure to appear on Apr-01-2016 is denied. Court orders counsel to pay outstanding sanctions within 15 days from the date of this notice.*** JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)
